blockingIssues.description: isInsufficientIdentityError is too broad: it returns true for ANY ConvexError with string data (error instanceof ConvexError && typeof error.data === 'string'). convex/jobs.ts throws 5 different ConvexErrors with string data — server errors like 'Unable to create or locate the canonical job record' and 'Unable to initialize the shared workspace' would incorrectly return 400 instead of 500. Fix: add error.data content checks, e.g. error.data.includes('stable job ID') || error.data.includes('company, title, and location').

appliedUpdates.description: Created .factory/library/testing.md documenting: (1) happy-dom as the DOM environment for client component tests (jsdom incompatible with Node ESM), (2) @vitest-environment happy-dom directive pattern, (3) Convex error classification pattern for API routes — must combine instanceof ConvexError with error.data content checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to the Testing section: document that @testing-library/react, @testing-library/user-event, and happy-dom are available as dev dependencies for client component testing. Note the `/** @vitest-environment happy-dom */` directive requirement.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-extension-job-checker-tests installed these libraries. Future workers writing client component tests won't know they're available without documentation. The AGENTS.md Testing section currently only mentions 'Follow existing vitest patterns in shared/job-matching.test.ts'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to the 'API route pattern' or 'Error responses' section: document the error handling pattern for Convex errors in API routes. Specifically: (1) use instanceof ConvexError for type discrimination, (2) also check error.data content to distinguish business errors from server errors, (3) document the matchedJobId retry fallback pattern in mark-applied.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-mark-route-error-handling introduced over-broad error matching because the pattern wasn't documented. The mark-applied route has complex error classification logic (ConvexError→400 for specific cases, plain Error→retry with matchedJobId, generic→500) that workers need to understand.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in backend-worker skill that the TDD red-green cycle doesn't apply to test-only features (where the task is purely to add tests for existing code). Test-only features should skip the 'red' phase.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-extension-job-checker-tests worker noted in skillFeedback that the TDD requirement was inapplicable for a test-only task.
